title: Stichorkis lingulata

The species is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as Malaysia and Indonesia. Stichorkis lingulata is a terrestrial orchid that grows in the tropical forests of its native range. It is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the orchid family.
